default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and upcoming deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality has significantly improved, with recent articles showing better structure, readability, and personality](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [SEO strategy shift: focus on highly relevant, potentially lower-volume keywords aligned with Webstacks' core services](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [177 pieces published to date; some high-impression articles experiencing drop-offs, prompting discussion on content refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [177 pieces published so far](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Detailed performance breakdown available in shared spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Clicks remain stable, but significant drop in weekly impressions](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Top 10 impacted pages identified, e.g., "On-page SEO for enterprises" lost \~4,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

### SEO Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift focus from high-volume, competitive keywords to more niche, relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Prioritize content aligned with Webstacks' core services: design, development, and technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct keyword research based on Webstacks-provided pillars](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Emphasis on bottom-of-funnel and low-volume but highly relevant keywords](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Recent articles praised for improved structure, readability, and personality](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Key improvements: varied sentence structure, expert-like tone, better formatting (headers, bullet points, internal links)](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [AI prompts refined to produce more human-like, engaging content](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Aida to share additional Webstacks brand voice/tone resources to further enhance content](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Upcoming Content Pipeline

  - [9 articles assigned to writer Soka, based on satisfactory first piece](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Aida to edit and stage articles tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Jesse to provide imagery for 3 articles, send folder of images for others](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Next week's assignments still being drafted, outlines to be provided by end of tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse to send pillar topics for keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Aida to conduct keyword research using SEMrush, considering both traffic potential and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Jesse to re-share Webstacks brand voice/tone resources and example blogs](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Aida to edit and stage new articles, incorporating provided imagery](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Jesse to draft and share next week's content assignments by end of tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Team to continue refining AI prompts for optimal content quality](https://fathom.video/share/JmkquT4qy5SwF6SCf7589JTYRCTQj-6i?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

action_items.description: Review existing content; determine pieces for enrichment vs repurposing/removal
Compile & send content pillars to Aida for keyword research
Re-share links re: Webstacks brand, voice, tone, positioning to Aida
Edit & stage this week's content pieces tomorrow
Message Aida re: which articles have images vs need them
